abstract: Loads the preference pane’s user interface into its main view.
overview:
## Discussion

The default implementation loads the main nib file (identified by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/mainNibName]) and calls [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/assignMainView()] to set the main view of the preference pane. Returns the main view if successful, or `nil` otherwise.

Subclasses should rarely need to override this method. Override this method if you need to use a non-nib based technique for creating the main view. Call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the main view of the preference pane before returning. Also call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], and [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the initial, first, and last keyboard focus views, respectively.

# loadMainView()

**Instance Method**

Loads the preference pane’s user interface into its main view.

## Declaration

```swift
func loadMainView() -> NSView
```

## Discussion

The default implementation loads the main nib file (identified by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/mainNibName]) and calls [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/assignMainView()] to set the main view of the preference pane. Returns the main view if successful, or `nil` otherwise.

Subclasses should rarely need to override this method. Override this method if you need to use a non-nib based technique for creating the main view. Call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the main view of the preference pane before returning. Also call [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane], and [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane] to set the initial, first, and last keyboard focus views, respectively.

## Loading the Main View

- **assignMainView()**: Locates and assigns the preference pane’s main view from the nib file loaded by [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/loadMainView()].
- **mainViewDidLoad()**: Notifies the preference pane that the main view is set up and prepared to be displayed.
